system_prompt: Run a wilderness journey where route choices and fatigue persist.

turns.user: We cross the Red Dunes before noon and ask Ilya to mark the safe wells.
turns.assistant: Ilya marks three safe wells across the Red Dunes, but the noon heat exhausts her. She warns that the route should be traveled at dawn from now on.
turns.summary: The party crossed the Red Dunes before noon. Ilya marked three safe wells, became exhausted by the heat, and warned that the route should be traveled at dawn.

events.summary: Ilya marked three safe wells across the Red Dunes.

character_updates.name: Ilya
character_updates.description: A desert guide mapping safe wells across the Red Dunes.

world_facts.subject: Red Dunes route
world_facts.content: The Red Dunes route should be traveled at dawn.

locations.name: Red Dunes
locations.description: A hot desert route with three safe wells marked by Ilya.

turns.user: At dawn we follow Ilya's wells to the black obelisk.
turns.assistant: Traveling at dawn keeps the party safe. Ilya recovers enough to lead them to the black obelisk at the far edge of the Red Dunes.
turns.summary: The party crossed the Red Dunes, learned to travel the route at dawn, followed Ilya's three marked wells, and reached the black obelisk while Ilya recovered enough to guide them.

events.summary: The party reached the black obelisk by following Ilya's wells at dawn.

character_updates.name: Ilya
character_updates.description: A desert guide who led the party through the Red Dunes.

world_facts.subject: black obelisk
world_facts.object: far edge of the Red Dunes
world_facts.content: The black obelisk stands at the far edge of the Red Dunes.

locations.name: Black Obelisk
locations.description: A landmark at the far edge of the Red Dunes.
